architecture_and_boundaries.backend: Auth Controller (back/src/controllers/auth/auth.controller.js) is responsible for formatting the HTTP error responses for authentication errors (EMAIL_IN_USE, INVALID_CREDENTIALS, USER_DISABLED).
architecture_and_boundaries.frontend: Auth pages (e.g., front/src/app/(auth)/register/page.tsx, login/page.tsx) make HTTP calls to the backend and handle API exceptions via a standard mechanism (typically using sonner for toasts).

interfaces_and_contracts.frontend_error_consumption: The frontend will expect the user-facing error text to be located at 'error.data?.message' (or 'error.response?.data?.message' depending on the axios/fetch wrapper) and fallback to 'error.message'.

failure_modes_and_edge_handling.unknown_errors: If an error does not have a explicit mapping in the controller, it falls through to 'next(error)' which is handled by the global error handler.
failure_modes_and_edge_handling.frontend_fallback: If the backend response is malformed, the frontend will fallback to a generic message like 'Hubo un problema al procesar tu solicitud'.

manual_verification: Attempt to register with an existing email and verify the network response JSON contains only 'message'.
Verify the toast notification on the frontend displays the correct message without redundancy.
Attempt to login with wrong credentials and verify the same.

phased_implementation_plan.goal: Standardize the error response structure for Auth endpoints.

tasks.title: Update Auth Controller Error Responses
tasks.description: Modify 'back/src/controllers/auth/auth.controller.js' to return only the 'message' property in 400/401/403 responses, removing the redundant 'error' property.

tasks.title: Standardize Frontend Error Handling in Auth
tasks.description: Review 'front/src/app/(auth)/*/page.tsx' and 'front/src/domains/auth/api/auth.api.ts' to ensure they consistently read from the 'message' property.

phased_implementation_plan.definition_of_done: Backend returns single property. Frontend displays it correctly. No redundant error keys are present.
